questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Integris and First Focus are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with First Focus, Integris, and/or any other connected entity of OMERS Apollo active in the technology sector.
